title: F&M Bank Announces Executive Leadership Appointments to Support Continued Growth and Strategic Execution
author: F&M Bank
description: F&M Bank announced several executive leadership appointments including Eric Faust as Chief Operating Officer, Melody Charlton as Chief Legal and Compliance Officer, and the continuation of Benét Rupp as Chief People Officer. These moves support the bank's significant growth from $1.1 billion to $3.55 billion in assets since 2018, with expanded responsibilities for Chief Lending Officer Dave Gerken to strengthen regional strategy and operational execution.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The bank is making strategic leadership appointments to support continued growth and operational execution. The organization has demonstrated significant expansion (assets tripled from $1.1B to $3.55B since 2018), and these appointments strengthen capabilities in risk management, compliance, legal oversight, and regional operations. The moves reflect confidence in future growth and organizational maturity.

title: Farmers & Merchants Bancorp, Inc. Declares 2026 First-Quarter Cash Dividend
author: Globe Newswire
description: Farmers & Merchants Bancorp, Inc. (NASDAQ: FMAO) announced a quarterly cash dividend of $0.23 per share, representing a 4.0% year-over-year increase. The dividend is payable on April 20, 2026, to shareholders of record as of April 3, 2026. The company, with total assets of $3.43 billion, operates as a community bank across Ohio, Indiana, and Michigan.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The company announced a 4.0% year-over-year increase in its quarterly dividend, demonstrating confidence in financial performance and commitment to returning capital to shareholders. Dividend increases are typically viewed as a positive signal of company health and profitability.

title: Farmers & Merchants Bancorp, Inc. Declares 2025 Fourth-Quarter Cash Dividend
author: Globe Newswire
description: Farmers & Merchants Bancorp announced a quarterly cash dividend of $0.23 per share, representing a 4% year-over-year increase. The dividend will be payable on January 20, 2026, to shareholders of record as of December 29, 2025.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The company demonstrated strong financial performance by increasing its dividend for the 31st consecutive year, indicating consistent growth and shareholder value creation

title: F&M’s Annual Ohio and Indiana Golf Classics Raise $48,500 for Local Charities
author: Lars Eller
description: F&M Bank successfully hosted two charity golf events in Ohio and Indiana, raising $48,500 for local organizations supporting family health, veterans, disability services, and child advocacy.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The bank demonstrated strong community engagement by organizing charity golf events that raised significant funds for local nonprofit organizations, showcasing corporate social responsibility
The parent company supported local community initiatives through its bank's charitable events, highlighting commitment to social impact and community development

title: F&M Bank Announces Board Leadership Transition: Andrew Briggs to Step Down as Chairman, Kevin J. Sauder Named Successor
author: Lars B. Eller
description: F&M Bank is transitioning board leadership, with Andrew Briggs stepping down as Chairman and Kevin J. Sauder being named his successor, effective immediately. Sauder, a long-time board member, will work closely with Briggs to ensure a smooth transition.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The article describes a planned, collaborative leadership transition with positive language about continuity, strategic momentum, and future growth
